message:
Add card presets and community themes to marketplace

Adds 3 card presets (Pod Health Monitor, Warning Event Stream, Cluster Overview)
and 2 community themes (Midnight Blue, Amber Glow). Updates registry to v1.1.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "version": "1.1.0",
   "updatedAt": "2026-02-10T00:00:00Z",
   "items": [
     {
@@ -34,6 +34,63 @@
       "tags": ["gitops", "helm", "argocd", "deployments"],
       "cardCount": 5,
       "type": "dashboard"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "pod-health-monitor",
+      "name": "Pod Health Monitor",
+      "description": "Card showing pods with issues like CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, pending states, and high restart counts.",
+      "author": "kubestellar",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "downloadUrl": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/card-presets/pod-health-monitor.json",
+      "tags": ["monitoring", "pods", "health"],
+      "cardCount": 1,
+      "type": "card-preset"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "warning-event-stream",
+      "name": "Warning Event Stream",
+      "description": "Live stream of warning-level Kubernetes events across all clusters, filtered to show only actionable alerts.",
+      "author": "kubestellar",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "downloadUrl": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/card-presets/warning-event-stream.json",
+      "tags": ["events", "monitoring", "alerts"],
+      "cardCount": 1,
+      "type": "card-preset"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "cluster-overview-card",
+      "name": "Cluster Overview",
+      "description": "At-a-glance cluster health and status card showing all connected clusters with their node counts and health indicators.",
+      "author": "kubestellar",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "downloadUrl": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/card-presets/cluster-overview.json",
+      "tags": ["clusters", "overview", "health"],
+      "cardCount": 1,
+      "type": "card-preset"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "midnight-blue",
+      "name": "Midnight Blue",
+      "description": "Deep blue theme with navy tones and teal accents — a calmer alternative to the default space theme.",
+      "author": "community",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "downloadUrl": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/themes/midnight-blue.json",
+      "tags": ["dark", "blue", "minimal"],
+      "cardCount": 0,
+      "type": "theme",
+      "themeColors": ["#0891b2", "#3b82f6", "#6366f1", "#10b981", "#06b6d4"]
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "amber-glow",
+      "name": "Amber Glow",
+      "description": "Warm amber and orange tones on a dark background — cozy and easy on the eyes for late-night ops.",
+      "author": "community",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "downloadUrl": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/themes/amber-glow.json",
+      "tags": ["dark", "warm", "amber"],
+      "cardCount": 0,
+      "type": "theme",
+      "themeColors": ["#f59e0b", "#f97316", "#ef4444", "#10b981", "#06b6d4"]
     }
   ]
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+{
+  "id": "amber-glow",
+  "name": "Amber Glow",
+  "description": "Warm amber and orange tones on a dark background",
+  "author": "community",
+  "dark": true,
+  "starField": false,
+  "glowEffects": true,
+  "gradientAccents": true,
+  "colors": {
+    "background": "20 14% 4%",
+    "foreground": "36 33% 96%",
+    "card": "20 14% 8%",
+    "cardForeground": "36 33% 96%",
+    "primary": "38 92% 50%",
+    "primaryForeground": "20 14% 4%",
+    "secondary": "20 14% 14%",
+    "secondaryForeground": "36 33% 96%",
+    "muted": "20 14% 14%",
+    "mutedForeground": "28 15% 55%",
+    "accent": "25 95% 53%",
+    "accentForeground": "20 14% 4%",
+    "destructive": "0 84% 60%",
+    "destructiveForeground": "0 0% 100%",
+    "border": "20 14% 18%",
+    "input": "20 14% 14%",
+    "ring": "38 92% 50%",
+    "brandPrimary": "#f59e0b",
+    "brandSecondary": "#f97316",
+    "brandTertiary": "#ef4444",
+    "success": "#10b981",
+    "warning": "#fbbf24",
+    "error": "#ef4444",
+    "info": "#06b6d4",
+    "glassBackground": "rgba(28, 20, 10, 0.85)",
+    "glassBorder": "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15)",
+    "glassShadow": "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2)",
+    "scrollbarThumb": "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3)",
+    "scrollbarThumbHover": "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.5)",
+    "chartColors": ["#f59e0b", "#f97316", "#10b981", "#ef4444", "#06b6d4", "#8b5cf6", "#fbbf24", "#14b8a6"]
+  },
+  "font": {
+    "family": "'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif",
+    "monoFamily": "'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace",
+    "weight": { "normal": 400, "medium": 500, "semibold": 600, "bold": 700 }
+  }
+}
